goal: Run the full release candidate pipeline for EmergentWebActions: (1) run the full pytest suite and confirm all tests pass, (2) run any linter if configured, (3) push the current main branch to origin to trigger a Render staging deploy, (4) run the smoke tests in scripts/smoke-test.sh against the staging URL if available, (5) produce a deploy summary. This is a staging deploy — do NOT touch production.
acceptance_criteria: main branch pushed to origin successfully
Smoke test results recorded in output contract
Output contract status is success or blocked-pending-smoke (not failed)
